full_text:
Lady Ren
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Ren. Of influential family, she was beautiful. Rash, she angered Cao Pi and was sacked. Lady Ren was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
